title: ilex subrugosa
intro: Ilex subrugosa, also known as the Chinese Holly, is a shrub native to southern China and Taiwan, characterized by its glossy leaves and red berries. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and protecting against cardiovascular disease. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments.
